description_long: This induction cooker features a retro-inspired design with a maroon body and a metallic silver cooktop. The cooktop is equipped with three black coil burners of varying sizes, arranged asymmetrically for versatile cooking options. The front panel includes a large, angular oven door with a blue frame and two metallic handles, suggesting an integrated oven compartment. The control panel is located on the top right, housing several knobs and buttons for adjusting heat and settings, with a slanted red accent for visual contrast. The cooker stands on four slender, tapered legs, elevating it above the ground and giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic. The overall construction appears robust, with a combination of metal and glass materials, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A retro-style induction cooker with a maroon body, metallic cooktop, three black coil burners, and a blue-framed oven door. Features a top-mounted control panel and stands on four tapered legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue-framed oven door, two metallic handles, and the full cooktop with three burners and the control panel.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the control panel's buttons and knobs, as well as the oven door handle protruding from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain maroon back panel and the cooktop surface with burners, with no visible controls or handles.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the side profile of the oven door handle and the cooktop burners, with minimal detail on the control panel.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the top right of the cooktop, featuring several round knobs and buttons arranged in a linear fashion. The panel is slightly slanted and includes a red accent area, but no visible labels, icons, or indicator lights are present.
